current_task: Implemented Geiger counter standalone sandbox simulator unlocked after the game finale
next_actions: Ready for user acceptance testing and final game feedback.
notes: Added a standalone Geiger counter simulator module (js/geiger_sandbox.js) that implements a logarithmic dial Canvas, micro-jitter physics, customizable sources, and dynamic audio sound mapping. This is unlocked upon game completion (saving chernobyl_geiger_unlocked: 'true' in localStorage) and is directly accessible via a new green button on the main welcome screen.
